assertions.title: Best Experiment Highlighted

steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully with 434+ experiments displayed in AG Grid table

steps.expected: exp_lme_0008 row is visible and visually distinguished
steps.observed: exp_lme_0008 row is visible but has NO visual distinction from other rows

steps.action: Inspect exp_lme_0008 row CSS classes via JavaScript
steps.expected: Row has 'best-experiment' class or similar visual distinction class
steps.observed: Row classes are standard AG Grid classes only: 'ag-row-no-focus ag-row ag-row-level-0 ag-row-position-absolute ag-row-not-inline-editing ag-row-even ag-row-first'. No 'best-experiment' class present.

steps.action: Compare computed styles of exp_lme_0008 row vs adjacent rows
steps.expected: exp_lme_0008 row has different background color, border, or shadow
steps.observed: All rows have identical styling: backgroundColor=rgb(255,255,255), no border, boxShadow=none

steps.action: Search for star/badge/highlight icons in exp_lme_0008 row
steps.expected: Row contains visual indicator (star, badge, etc.)
steps.observed: No star, badge, highlight, trophy, or gold elements found in the row

steps.action: Check page for elements with 'best'/'highlight'/'star' CSS classes
steps.expected: Some elements have best/highlight related styling classes
steps.observed: Zero elements found with classes containing 'best', 'highlight', 'star', 'trophy', or 'gold'
Sidebar text confirmed: 'Showing 8 experiments (both eras) · Best: exp_lme_0008' — sidebar works but row highlight does not

steps.expected: No JS errors related to row class application

cssInspection.rowClasses: ag-row-no-focus ag-row ag-row-level-0 ag-row-position-absolute ag-row-not-inline-editing ag-row-even ag-row-first

assertions.issues: The best experiment row (exp_lme_0008) is NOT visually distinguished in the AG Grid leaderboard table. The row has only standard AG Grid CSS classes with no 'best-experiment' class applied. Background color, border, and box-shadow are identical to all other rows. No star, badge, highlight, or trophy icons are present in the row. No elements on the page have CSS classes containing 'best', 'highlight', 'star', 'trophy', or 'gold'. The sidebar correctly displays 'Best: exp_lme_0008' text, but this does not satisfy the assertion requirement of visual distinction in the leaderboard table itself. This is consistent with the known failure context: rowClassRules callback not executing in dash-ag-grid 33.3.3.

summary: VAL-TABLE-019: FAIL — Best experiment (exp_lme_0008) row has NO visual distinction in the leaderboard. rowClassRules function callback not applying 'best-experiment' class. Sidebar correctly shows 'Best: exp_lme_0008' but the table row itself is indistinguishable from other rows. All rows have identical white background and standard AG Grid classes.
